content:
🔥 proxmox-manager | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a user-friendly, scriptable interface for managing Proxmox VE virtual machines and containers directly from the command line.
✨ Key Features: • Single-file Bash script for Proxmox VE management • Interactive TUI for VMs and CTs • Start, stop, restart instances with confirmation • Console access (LXC shell or QEMU terminal) • Snapshot management (list, create, rollback, delete)
📖 Summary: Proxmox Manager is a single Bash script that provides an interactive text-based user interface (TUI) for managing Proxmox Virtual Machines (VMs) and Containers (CTs). It simplifies common tasks like starting, stopping, listing, and managing snapshots, offering both interactive and machine-readable output options.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ gridland | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Developing cross-platform terminal user interfaces (TUIs) that can be deployed as both standalone command-line applications and web applications.
✨ Key Features: • Build terminal apps that run in the browser • React integration for UI development • Built on OpenTUI rendering engine • Quick start with `create-gridland` • Interactive demos
📖 Summary: Gridland is a TypeScript framework for building terminal applications that can also run seamlessly in web browsers. It leverages the OpenTUI rendering engine and provides React components for creating interactive command-line interfaces.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 NomAI-App | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: Personalized AI-powered nutrition tracking and meal analysis for healthier eating habits.
✨ Key Features: • Meal logging with detailed nutrition breakdowns • AI chat assistant for analysis, planning, and tips • Monthly analytics with charts and summary statistics • Personalization based on dietary preferences, allergies, and targets • Image recognition for faster meal logging
📖 Summary: NomAI is an open-source Flutter application designed for tracking meals and analyzing nutrition. It leverages AI to provide personalized guidance, making healthy eating more accessible and sustainable through features like quick logging, detailed analytics, and a conversational assistant.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 GitHub-Store | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a centralized and user-friendly platform for discovering, installing, and managing open-source applications distributed via GitHub releases across multiple operating systems.
✨ Key Features: • Browse and discover open-source apps from GitHub releases • One-click installation of apps • Automatic detection of installable binaries (APK, EXE, DMG, AppImage, DEB, RPM)
📖 Summary: GitHub Store is a cross-platform application store that allows users to discover and install open-source software directly from GitHub releases. It supports automatic detection of various executable formats and provides a streamlined one-click installation process with update tracking.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 BloomeeTunes | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified, ad-free music listening experience by combining local music playback with streaming from various online sources through a plugin system.
✨ Key Features: • Ad-Free Experience • Plugins system for music sources • Local Music playback • Karaoke-Style Lyrics • Audio Equalizer
📖 Summary: BloomeeTunes is a cross-platform, ad-free music player built with Flutter and Rust. It allows users to seamlessly stream music from various online sources via a plugin system while also playing local music files. The app offers features like lyrics, an equalizer, and Last.fm scrobbling.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
